div.head: The Diplomatic Agent and Consul General at Tangier (Blake) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 3. Your telegram No. 4, January 22, 6 p.m. Conditions Department’s assent mailed French Resident General January 25, 1929.Note dated January 23, 1929. Latter telegraphed me January 30, 1929; taxation referred to becomes applicable February 1st. All the measures definitely adopted without amendment in December sessions Legislative Assembly. Promulgation by Sultan’s representative on January 31st and countersignature President Committee of Control gave them executive authority. Enforcement gate tax delayed by adjustment of administrative dispositions until yesterday.
